title: Teenage Hooker Becomes a Killing Machine
original_title: 대학로에서 매춘하다가 토막살해당한 여고생 아직 대학로에 있다
overview: A high-school girl who moonlights as a prostitute is revived as a killing machine after she is murdered by her teacher.
